name: financial_auditor_agent
description: A financial auditing agent that calculates key financial ratios, detects transaction anomalies using Z-score analysis, and generates structured audit reports with risk ratings.

skills.name: Financial Ratio Analysis
skills.description: Calculate gross margin, net margin, current ratio, debt-to-equity, ROA, ROE, and operating ratio from raw financial statement figures.
examples: Calculate financial ratios: revenue $5M, COGS $2M, OpEx $1M, net income $800K, assets $4M, liabilities $1.5M, current assets $1.2M, current liabilities $600K, equity $2.5M
What is the current ratio if current assets are $300,000 and current liabilities are $150,000?
Analyze the debt-to-equity ratio for a company with $2M liabilities and $3M equity

skills.name: Transaction Anomaly Detection
skills.description: Detect statistically anomalous transactions in a dataset using Z-score analysis with configurable thresholds.
examples: Detect outliers in my expense data with a 3-sigma threshold
Which transactions look suspicious in this list: [500, 480, 510, 495, 12000, 505, 490]?

skills.name: Audit Report Generation
skills.description: Generate a structured audit summary report with a risk score and recommendation based on findings.
examples: Generate an audit report for Acme Corp Q3 2024: revenue $2M, net income $180K, 3 anomalies, high-risk ratios: current_ratio
Create a financial audit summary for FY 2023 with no anomalies found
Produce an audit report showing high risk for a company with 8 anomalies and poor ratios
